This makes sense because sweeps of LQ are always good. I’d say most strategies start with a sweep of LQ, so check. A couple things that would help is 1. Perhaps dropping down to a lower TF like the 1 or 3m so you can see better market structure and get a better entry with a tighter stop. One candle isn’t enough to see if price is building structure IMO. 2. Look for where price accumulated and use this as an initial target. Market makers will manipulate the price in one direction to collect orders for a run in the opposite direction. Overall, looks great. A few tweaks and this could be an 80% win rate.  Great job.
